seoTitle: Enter Home Energy Tax Credits in TurboTax 2026
metaDescription: See how to check eligibility and enter Home Energy Tax Credits in TurboTax for 2026, so energy-efficient upgrades actually lower your tax bill.
intro: Energy-efficient home upgrades can translate into real tax savings, but only if you enter them correctly. This guide walks through how to check whether your home improvements qualify and how to enter Home Energy Tax Credits in TurboTax for the 2026 tax year, using the software's guided process to make sure nothing gets missed. It's useful whether you're filing your own return or preparing returns for clients.

steps.heading: Get an overview of Home Energy Tax Credits
steps.body: Understand what these credits cover before diving into TurboTax, so you know what kind of home improvements might qualify.

steps.heading: Check the eligibility criteria
steps.body: Review what makes a home improvement eligible for the credit before you start entering anything into your return.

steps.heading: Follow the step-by-step guide in TurboTax
steps.body: Use TurboTax's guided process to enter your qualifying home energy improvements accurately.

steps.heading: Apply tips for maximizing your savings
steps.body: A few pointers on getting the most from energy-efficient upgrades help ensure you're not underclaiming what you're eligible for.

faq.question: What home improvements qualify for Home Energy Tax Credits?
faq.answer: Eligibility depends on the type of energy-efficient upgrade made to your home, and the video covers the criteria to check before claiming the credit.

faq.question: Where do I enter Home Energy Tax Credits in TurboTax?
faq.answer: TurboTax has a guided process specifically for these credits, walking you through entering qualifying improvements step by step.

faq.question: Can tax professionals use this same process for clients?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial is designed for both individual taxpayers filing their own returns and professional preparers handling client returns.

faq.question: How much can I save with these credits?
faq.answer: Savings depend on your specific improvements and eligibility, but the video shares tips for maximizing your savings through energy-efficient upgrades.
